mapper.select: SELECT comment_no, board_no, commenter, content, reg_date FROM BOARD_COMMENT WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} ORDER BY COMMENT_NO ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BOARD_COMMENT(comment_no, board_no, commenter, content, reg_date) VALUES(BOARD_COMMENT_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{boardNo} ,#{commenter}, #{content}, SYSDATE)
